name: @floom/renderer
description: Floom default + custom output/input renderer library. Ships 10 default output components + 13 default input components. Contract shape borrowed from Vercel AI SDK parts pattern (input-available / output-available / output-error).

scripts.test: echo '@floom/renderer: driven by test/stress/test-renderer-defaults.mjs + test-renderer-contract.mjs + test-renderer-bundler.mjs' && exit 0
